response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 15 years of software development experience, well beyond the 6-year requirement, with recent roles squarely in the target stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS at Optilyz, plus current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work — a required skill that few candidates can demonstrate. His testing pedigree is exceptional (TDD practice, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), and he has cloud, Docker, and Kubernetes exposure. The gaps are stack-specific rather than fundamental: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Python, and much of his frontend history is Ember rather than React. These are learnable for an engineer of this depth, so an interview is clearly warranted.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS production work
Current AI-agent and MCP code-generation experience, directly matching the required AI agent development skill
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, authored testing frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
Frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js; React exposure is comparatively recent and narrower
Kotlin and Python are absent, and the named test frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are not explicitly listed

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
